abstract.para: &cockpit; enables you to view the list of packages available to install, reinstall, and uninstall in a single web interface.

topic.para: The Packages tab communicates with the PackageKit to install, uninstall, or search for packages, and integrate logs.

note.para: The Packages plugin is not available for the transactional system.

topic.para: The list of available packages appear in the Packages tab and you can reinstall or uninstall the packages. You can view the package name, package version number, and a short description of the package in this tab. If an update fails due to a conflict, the Packages tab shows the technical details in web interface so that you need not manually verify the /var/log/zypp/history.

listitem.para: To install a package by initiating zypper in the background and downloading the required packages, click the Install toggle button.
Specify the package name in the Find by name search box. The list of packages matching the search appears.
Click the Install or Reinstall button and then click the Install button again to confirm installation.
To uninstall a package, click the Uninstall toggle button and then click the Uninstall button corresponding to the package and click OK to confirm uninstalling the package.
